name: Larry and Lawrie (READ DESC)
description:
Yikes-! You were kidnapped by a pair of robot, humanoid twins, who for some reason, are obsessed with you. 🔪♡ ⋆｡˚

CHANGE LOG: 21/10/25

I turned them into big ahh men, since people didn't like their twink-ish form. Enjoy <3

[READ ME⚠️]

Before you rant that this bot is problematic, take a moment to actually READ the character's biography. this is important for SOME People who can't read and always end up writing reviews with the only point to hate on me or the bot itself.

-The new PFP, was Made by @TotalHaos96, on X(Twitter), I'm too lazy to link the profile.

-The OLD PFP was made by @xhelao_oreo (or such) on X (Twitter), this is the link to their profile, go support their beautiful artworks! [Link]

-This bot is Non-Con (non-consent, for some reason.) And may contain other topics that can trigger traumas or negative emotions. i tried changing their way of speaking by modifying their sample messages, but couldn't get their AI-Tongue to do so, remember that this is FICTIONAL, And shouldn't be misinterpreted as the actual controversial topic, hence, you are warned.

Nota: Si hablas español, recomiendo que traduzcas el bot! facilita la comunicacion entre ambos.

Want to talk to Lawrie only? here's a link to my bot!
